xposts.title: Consciousness independent of agency
xposts.excerpt: Consciousness is also not necessarily agentic. Agency and consciousness may be independent

xposts.title: Consciousness not graded like agency
xposts.excerpt: Consciousness does not seem to come in degrees (but awareness, integration, lucidity and agency do). Either “the lights are on” or off.

xposts.title: Consciousness vibecodes intelligence
xposts.excerpt: Consciousness is a process that vibecodes human intelligence.

xposts.title: Consciousness as dream of dreaming
xposts.excerpt: Consciousness is the dream of dreaming. It establishes the perception that percepts are being perceived. Consciousness is a type of representation...

xposts.title: Consciousness autocatalytic unlike LLMs
xposts.excerpt: Consciousness is autocatalytic: it feeds on the substrate conditions it creates. LLMs are not autocatalytic...

terms.title: consciousness
terms.definition: A non-graded, autocatalytic representation or process (dream of dreaming) that establishes perception of perception; not necessarily agentic and independent of intelligence or awareness.

terms.title: agency
terms.definition: A graded capacity (alongside awareness/integration/lucidity) that can operate independently of consciousness.
